characters.name: Adira
characters.description: AdiraBackground informationTV seriesRapunzel's Tangled AdventureVoiceKelly HuCharacter informationOther namesWeirdo & Weird Shadow Lady (byCassandra)Tall Person (byEugene Fitzherbert)Sister (byHector)SymbolCircle with 3 linesGenderFemale ♀SpeciesHumanOccupationWarriorOnly Female Member of the BrotherhoodAffiliationsthe BrotherhoodGoalTo guide the earthly embodiment of the Sundrop Flower to the Dark Kingdom (succeeded)HomeDark KingdomAlliesQuirinRapunzelEugene FitzherbertCassandra(formerly)HectorVarianRuddigerEnemiesThe BaronAnthony the WeaselHector(formerly)Cassandra(formerly)Zhan TiriLikesDueling, cake, nicknaming peopleDislikesBeing touched (briefly; after being hurt)Powers and abilitiesMartial artsSwordsmanship (formerly)WeaponsShadow Blade(formerly)Demanitus' enchanted spear (briefly)Adirais a supporting character inRapunzel's Tangled Adventure. A fierce, yet mysterious warrior, she serves asRapunzel's guide to the source of the ominousblack rocksthat have plagued parts of the entire world with their powerful shadows duringSeason Two. A quarter of a century ago, long before the show began, Adira was a servant ofKing Edmundand resided in akingdomcorrupted by apowerful opal. When the stone's power made their home unbearable, Adira and her associateQuirinwere ordered to leave the kingdom and to stop anyone from finding the stone's location. In the following years, Adira dedicated her life to studying the mysterious black rocks connected to the opal that destroyed her kingdom. Her travels would lead her toCorona, where she discovered that the rocks - for unknown reasons - had been searching forRapunzel. Having learned the same, Rapunzel left her kingdom to uncover the truth behind the rocks, prompting Adira to reveal herself so as to steer the possessor of the ancientSundrop Flower'snew formon a safe path to the Dark Kingdom, where she came from.

characters.name: Andrew
characters.description: AndrewBackground informationTV seriesRapunzel's Tangled AdventureFirst episode"Under Raps"Latest episode"Rapunzel's Return"VoiceDean WintersCharacter informationFull nameHubertOther namesless-attractive-than-me guy with the man-bun, man-bun guy (by Eugene)GenderMale ♂SpeciesHumanOccupationSeparatists of SaporiaHomeSaporiaRelativesThe original members of the Separatists of Saporia (ancestors)AlliesVarian(formerly)KaiClementineMaisieJuniperEnemiesCassandra,Princess Rapunzel,Eugene Fitzherbert,VarianLikesCassandra (formerly)DislikesCorona,Rapunzel,Eugene Fitzherbert,VarianWeaponsSwordFateDefeated by Princess Rapunzel and the reformed Varian and sent to prison againAndrew, real nameHubert, is the antagonist of the episode,Under Raps. He is a mysterious visitor from out of town who forms a relationship withCassandrain hopes of using her to steal anancient journal. In Under Raps, he pretends to like Cassandra to get close to a map in the journal of Herz Der Soone. Little did he realize, Cassandra was on to him the entire time and successfully stopped his evil plans. He then reappears in Season 3 as the main antagonist of the first episode. He and some other members of the Separatists of Saporia had apparently taken over Corona by teaming up with Varian. However, once Varian found out their true motive, he turned against them. Andrew is later seen with the other members loading the Quirineon onto a ship, planning to destroy Corona. Yet the plans were foiled by Rapunzel and Varian. Andrew and the three members Separatists of Saporia are seen floating away in bubbles after Varian drops an alchemy ball of his. He is last seen still with his head in the bubble in a cell with his members

characters.name: Anthony the Weasel
characters.description: Anthony the WeaselWeasel (nickname)Background informationTV seriesTangled: The SeriesVoiceGideon EmeryCharacter informationFull nameAnthony the WeaselOther namesThe WeaselTitlesThe Baron's right-hand minion (formerly)SpeciesHumanOccupationThief (formerly)GoalTo capture all of The Baron's traitorsHomeVardarosAlliesThe Baron(boss)EnemiesEugene Fitzherbert,Lance Strongbow,Angry and RedLikesRichesThe Baron pleasedDislikesTraitorsFateLeaveCoronaafter returning the kingdom's stolen richesAnthony the Weaselis a major antagonist inTangled: The Series,serving as the main antagonist of "Big Brothers of Corona" and "The Return of Quaid", the secondary antagonist of "Beyond the Corona Walls", and one of the tertiary antagonists of "Max and Eugene in Peril on the High Seas". Weasel works forThe Baronas his right-hand man. Weasel (nickname) Anthony was first appeared inThe Return of Strongbowwhere, eight years in the past, Weasel helped Flynn and Lance during a royal caravan robbery, posing as an unconscious man in the snow to bring the caravans to a halt, then revealing the facade to join in the hold-up. Weasel, however, betrays the two mid-heist and as he makes off with the goods, Weasel notes that his actions were "Baron's orders". Years later, Anthony, along with another one of the Baron's henchmen, discovered a hole within the wall of a vault belonging to Weasel's boss in Corona.

characters.description: AttilaBackground informationTV seriesTangled: The SeriesVoiceSteven BlumCharacter informationOther namesHornswaggle (by Captain of the Guards)OccupationThugPastry chefOwner of Attila the Bun bakeryAffiliationsPub ThugsHomeCorona Castle,CoronaAlliesHook Hand,Big Nose,Vladimir,Ulf,Shorty,Hook Foot,Flynn Rider,Rapunzel,Maximus,Old Lady Crowley,Monty,Willow,Queen Arianna,King FredericEnemiesCorona's royal guards(formerly),the Captain of the Guards(formerly), LudwigLikesBaking, cupcakes, dancing, money, love storiesDislikesBig Nose's poetry, criticismWeaponsMaceAttilais one of the Pub Thugs. Along with the rest of the main thugs, he first appears inTangled, and later becomes a recurring character inRapunzel's Tangled Adventure. He has never yet been seen unmasked by his horned helmet. It can be said, judging by his brawny arms and hulking appearance under his heavy fur and leather clothes, he seems quite buff. In "What the Hair?!," Attila is seen tending bar whenEugenevisits theSnuggly Ducklingto confide in the thugs. WhenBig Nosearrives shortly afterward, Attila sarcastically calls him "lover boy" and groans at the idea of hearing more of his gushing about his lady-friend Assunta.

characters.name: Axel
characters.description: AxelBackground informationTV seriesRapunzel's Tangled AdventureVoiceDee Bradley BakerCharacter informationOther namesO-at Bag (byAttila)The horse (byEugene Fitzherbert)MaxelmusGenderMale ♂SpeciesHorseHomeCoronaRelativesLady Caine(owner)AlliesLady CaineDwayneEnemiesMaximus, Rapunzel, Flynn Rider, Lance Strongbow, The Royal Guards, Captain of the Guards, Cassandra, Hook FootLikesApplesFidellaDislikesMaximusMudWeaponsHooves, teethFateArrested and put back in prison on the prison barge, along with the other prisonersAxelis a supporting character and trusty horse companion of the thief Dwayne in thefirstandsecond seasonofRapunzel's Tangled Adventure. He debuts in "Max's Enemy" which refers to him. Axel is a large and strong horse. He is black with a white stripe down his face, a white underbelly, a dark muzzle, and faded out blue colored eyes. He also has black hooves with a white fetlock around his hooves. He has a chestnut-colored mane and tail, with the mane pointed upwards, resembling a mow-hawk. He has a lighter chestnut-colored bridle, and a normal chestnut-colored harness, saddle, and girth, with a red saddle blanket lined with a gold-and-yellow lining.

characters.name: Big Nose
characters.description: Big NoseBackground informationFilmsTangledShortsTangled: Before Ever AfterTV seriesTangled: The SeriesVoiceJeffrey TamborCharacter informationOccupationThugAlliesMaximus, the Pub Thugs, Eugene, Rapunzel,  The Captain of the GuardsEnemiesMother Gothel, the Stabbington Brothers,  The Captain of the Guards (formerly)Big Noseis described as the most "beautiful" of all the thugs. He appears inTangledandRapunzel's Tangled Adventure. He is a hopeless romantic, with the tendency to be constantly abused by Hook Hand. His dream is to find love in someone who can see his inner beauty. He is first seen during "I've Got a Dream", where he expresses his various shortcomings while also hoping to find true love. In the end, he receives his wish after meeting a woman during the epilogue celebration. Big Nose is seen in Corona Castle during Eugene's verse of "Life After Happily Ever After". He, along with most of the main thugs, appear to have become Eugene's closest companions outside of Rapunzel and Maximus. During the scene, Big Nose is shown enjoying a spa treatment. He is also the only thug to actually speak.

characters.description: CalliopeTitles(s)Keeper of the Spire, Assistant to the Keeper of the Spire (formerly)CharacteristicsSpeciesHumanLow-Level MagicianGenderFemalePower(s)Simple magic tricksFateBecomes Keeper of the Spire after passing her master's testTraitsLikesMagicDislikesNobody notices herHairGingerEyesGreenProfessional StatusAffiliation(s)The SpireOccupation(s)Keeper of the Spire, Assistant to the Keeper of the Spire (formerly), street magician (formerly)AlignmentGood (but annoying)Personal StatusMarital statusAlivePetsBabyKurlockFriend(s)Keeper of the Spire,Rapunzel,Eugene,Cassandra,LanceEnemie(s)Cassandra(status unknown)MediaFirst Appearance"Keeper of the Spire"Last Appearance"Race to the Spire"TV seriesRapunzel's Tangled AdventureCalliopeis the current Keeper of the Spire. Formerly a street magician, Calliope became the original Keeper's apprentice when he saw her performing on the street and believed her to posses the necessary skills to become the next keeper. Before she was recruited by the Keeper to be his apprentice, Calliope was a failing street magician, who performed in front of aggressively indifferent crowds. Despite her failures, she continued to practice her craft, persevering through such hard times. One day, the Keeper noticed this young street performer and decided to take her under his wing. He saw the quality of a good Keeper in her: perseverance. Calliope is rather short compared to other characters in the series. Rapunzel, short as she may be still towers over Calliope. Calliope also has large, even over sized, wire-frame glasses. She wears her ginger hair tied back in a bun. Her beige robes are simple in design and have highlights of dark tan.

characters.name: Captain Quaid
characters.description: Captain QuaidBackground informationTV seriesTangled: The SeriesVoiceReg E. CatheyKeith David (additional voice work)Character informationFull nameQuaidOther namesCaptain Quaid the Blade, Cap, SheriffGenderMale ♂SpeciesHumanOccupationSheriff of VardarosBeekeeperAlliesVex,Rapunzel,Eugene Fitzherbert,Lance Strongbow,Cassandra,Maximus,Hook FootEnemiesThe Baron,Anthony the Weasel,The CollectorLikesBees, honey, justiceDislikesCrimes, being fooledCaptain Quaidis a character inTangled: The Series. He is the sheriff ofVardaros. Quaid is the sole authority figure of Vardaros, which was, at one point, a beautiful and prosperous city. Quaid's efficiency and strong sense of justice made crime unsustainable in the city, until the arrival ofthe Baronand his crew of cronies. Despite their muscle, Quaid stood his own against the Baron, forcing the crime boss to call in reinforcement in the form of an armored bounty hunter known as the Collector. Quaid was unfazed by the new adversary, but was physically incapable of defeating him without assistance. Quaid tried to rally the people to assist him in fighting back against the Baron, but to his disappointment, the citizens of Vardaros refused to fight and merely gave in to their new ruler. This would force Quaid to leave the city and enter retirement, as a full time beekeeper. In "The Return of Quaid", Anthony the Weasel takes over Vardaros in place of the fallen Baron, and looks to expand his reign to regions outside of the city.Rapunzellearns fromEugeneandLancethat Vardaros once had a protector known as "Quaid the Blade". According toVex, he retired years ago, thus allowing the city to fall under the Baron's control. Vex claims to know his whereabouts, however, and leads Rapunzel to his home. Quaid explains that he left Vardaros because the people lacked faith in themselves and the city, effectively killing any motivation he had to protect them. Quaid's moral compass prevents him from allowing Weasel to spread his tyranny, however, and he accepts Rapunzel's proposal to brush up his skills. Unfortunately, the results are mediocre at best. That, coupled with Vex's cynicism about Quaid's return, prompts the latter to pack his things and leave Vardaros. During his departure, Vex informs him of a robbery. Quaid instinctually foils the criminal, and the town embraces him as their hero, once again. Over time, Quaid continuously fights crime and solves problems all throughout the city, eventually reestablishing himself as the sheriff, once again. By his side is Vex, who becomes inspired by Quaid's heroism.

characters.description: CollectorCharacteristicsSpeciesHumanWeapon(s)Bolas, rope shooters, axeGenderMaleAppearanceOutfitFull metal suit of armorTraitsLikesTerrorizing Vardaros, collecting paymentsDislikesVardarosProfessional StatusAffiliation(s)The BaronOccupation(s)CollectorAlignmentBadPersonal StatusFriend(s)The Baron,Anthony the WeaselEnemie(s)Captain Quaid,Vex,Rapunzel,Eugene Fitzherbert,Cassandra,Lance StrongbowMediaFirst AppearanceThe Return of QuaidThe Collectoris a muscle-for-hire who terrorizes Vardaros in theseason 2episode,The Return of Quaid. Sometime ago, when Vardaros was in its glory days, theBaroncommissioned The Collector to "take over Vardaros" asCaptain Quaidputs it. Quaid tried to stop him but met his match when the townspeople refused to aid him in his fight against the colossus or the Baron's other goons. The Collector has a huge and hulking figure. His matching metal mask has 8 holes in it for sight and breathing. The armored suit also comes equipped with rope launchers and bolas to subdue those trying to stop him from collecting.

characters.name: Cutter
characters.description: The Cutter is a minor antagonist inTangled: The Series,serving as the secondary antagonist of "Big Brothers of Corona" and "The Return of Quaid" and the tertiary antagonist of "Beyond the Corona Walls". He is a very big guy who works forThe Baron. He is often seen withAnthony the Weaselthroughout the show. In "Big Brothers of Corona," the Baron sends him and Anthony to captureAngry and Red, then the 2 other men who came with them capture the kids. They find them, butEugene Fitzherbertoffers a deal: himself andLance Strongbowin exchange for the kids. Anthony gives Eugene a deal and the Cutter captures Lance and throws him into the transport jail. While they are going back to the Baron, the crown comes and the 2 other men go at it but Angry drops a bag and rope on them. Red puts a towel over Anthony's head and the Cutter tries to grab it, but then sees Angry get the keys and unlock the prisoners out. Then he notices that he and Anthony have been handcuffed and Lance locks them both in the transport jail. In "Beyond the Corona Walls," Eugene and his friends make a stop inVardarosduring their travels for resupply. The Cutter tells the men to "spread the word, Flynn Rider's in town". He and Anthony capture Eugene, Lance, and Shorty and bring them to the Baron. The Baron tells Eugene to keep good on the promise he made to his daughter,Stalyanor he, Lance, and Shorty will die. He is later seen fighting with Eugene's current girlfriend,Rapunzel. He is knocked out byMaximus. He also appears in "The Return of Quaid" after the Weasel has taken over Vardaros, and he serves as Weasel's right-hand man. He is seen stealing a bag from Vex after being ordered to collect.

characters.name: Dale
characters.description: DaleAliasMister, The John-a-vanni, Johnny-a-Johnny, JohnnyThe Jonovani (by Stan) Buddy(by Eugene)CharacteristicsSpeciesHumanGenderMaleFateArrested for his crimes and sent to the island prisonTraitsLikesstealing the painting of Robin XI, getting richDislikesgetting caught, being pointed out that his accent is fakeHairBrownEyesBrownProfessional StatusOccupation(s)ThiefAlignmentNeutral EvilPersonal StatusFriend(s)Lady Caine,Pocket, Otter, Bandanna, Skull Ruffian,The Stabbington Brothers,Axel,Anthony the WeaselEnemie(s)Eugene Fitzherbert,MediaFirst AppearanceFitzherbert P.I.Daleis an art thief who had his eyes on the one-of-kind painting of Robin XI in the episode "Fitzherbert P.I." Initially, he finds success in his goal to steal the painting, but Eugene eventually catches on and subdues him right before he can escape on the last ferry out ofCorona. The Giovanni wears a grayish-teal doublet with a darker jerkin and a black belt. He has brown pants with black shoes. He also has a fashionablerebatoand cuffs, probably in lace or linen. In "Fitzherbert P.I.," the fake The Giovanni poses as the realThe Giovanniin an attempt to steal the pricelessRobin XIpainting-the only one of its kind. He poses as a famous artist so that he can be close enough to steal the painting without anyone knowing. As part of his cover, he paints the royal portrait forRapunzel(though his actual painting is an absurdly childish daub). Eugene eventually realizes he is an impostor and catches him before he can escape with the real painting of Robin XI.

InFreebird,RapunzelandCassandratravel deep into a neighboring forest on their journey and run into Father andMother.  Both characters show that they can turn into birds with magical tea and can release the transformation with the breaking of a special egg.  We are unsure of the actual relationship between Father and Mother but they travel together searching for people that they can change into birds forever and they're most likely husband and wife.

Feldspar occasionally appeared as a minor supporting role in the series. He also appeared in the animated short, "Hare Peace," where he askedRapunzelto watch over his "precious". Rapunzel misunderstood "precious" as a bunny in a flower bed when Feldspar was referring to a head of cabbage. In "Fitzherbert P.I.," Feldspar hiredEugenefor a job as a cobbler but quickly fired him after remembering that he stole a pair of boots from him once.

characters.name: Fernanda Pizazzo
characters.description: Fernanda PizazzoBackground informationTV seriesTangled: The SeriesVoiceJessica St. ClairCharacter informationOccupationInventorAlliesRapunzelLikesAttentionGloryDr. CroixDislikesVarianFateWins the science fair through showmanship Fernanda Pizazzois a female Inventor that appears inTangled: The Series. Fernanda first appeared in the episodeGreat Expotations, as one of the inventors taking part of Corona's science fair. As she presents her creation to spectators, she unabashedly expresses her confidence that the fair's judge, Dr. Croix, will award her the winning prize by the end. Though her invention doesn't compare to the others, such as those created byRapunzelorVarian, she wins by a landslide, as Croix is apparently more interested in a flashy display, rather than breaking new ground in the scientific field.
